name: Lady Luckless, Ringmaster of the Last-Chance Carnival
text:
When Lady Luckless enters the battlefield, the carnival opens: each player rolls a six-sided die. You create a Treasure token for each player who rolled, then the lowest roller hands you the table snack. The house keeps the snack.
Ante the Pot — Whenever a player rolls one or more dice or flips one or more coins, you may pay {1}. If you do, that player draws a card and you put a Jackpot counter on Lady Luckless. The house always gets a cut.
{2}{B}{R}, Remove three Jackpot counters: Spin the wheel — each opponent loses 3 life and you gain that much life. The highest roller this turn keeps their dignity. Everyone else owes you.
flavorText: "Step right up. The first game is free. None of the others are."

extras.dice: table-wide payout whenever anyone rolls or flips
